title: The Forgotten Places
description: This mod adds a lot of mysterious sounds and structures filled with eerie silence and random footsteps. Sometimes the world flickers and changes - blocks shift, sounds distort, and unseen entities seem to watch you from the shadows (horror)
body:
The Forgotten Places is a horror mod that prioritizes atmosphere and psychological distress.
It introduces many new structures, where the silence is interrupted by deep-sounding footsteps, and minor distortions in the world.
There are no monsters, only the feeling that something unseen is there.
 
<details>
<summary>You can expect:</summary>

Very many structures.
 
Ambient horror sounds and random footsteps.
 
Perfect for dark or horror-themed modpacks 

</details>
